purpose: Example worker lane status model for showing operator-safe lane activity without launching workers or changing runtime state.

lanes.purpose: Primary Codex implementation lane for approved scoped edits.
lanes.current_activity: No local live lane telemetry is connected in DRY_RUN.
lanes.safe_next_action: Verify branch and git status before assigning work.

lanes.purpose: Secondary Codex implementation lane for isolated scaffold or validation work.
lanes.current_activity: No local live lane telemetry is connected in DRY_RUN.
lanes.safe_next_action: Use this lane only for explicitly scoped files.

lanes.purpose: Review or companion-worker lane. Do not assume it owns local files unless evidence exists.
lanes.current_activity: No local live lane telemetry is connected in DRY_RUN.
lanes.safe_next_action: Confirm ownership before editing overlapping files.

lanes.purpose: Operator control lane for review, approvals, safety gates, commits, and push decisions.
lanes.current_activity: No local live lane telemetry is connected in DRY_RUN.
lanes.safe_next_action: Keep commit, push, merge, and approval decisions under operator control.

status_rules.PASS: Lane is current and git status is clean.
status_rules.WARN: Lane is current but git status is dirty, or lane evidence is incomplete.
status_rules.FAIL: Multiple dirty lanes are detected from supplied lane evidence.
status_rules.UNKNOWN: Lane has no verified local evidence in this DRY_RUN checker.

next_safe_action: Run Get-AiOsWorkerLaneStatus.DRY_RUN.ps1 before assigning or applying lane work.
